_README: Per-breed subject descriptions for hero-image generation. The script (generate-breed-heroes.mjs) wraps each 'subject' in a shared photoreal/framing template, so edit only the breed-specific details here. Accuracy notes baked in for the high-risk breeds (designer mixes, merle, spots, brindle). Add new slugs here as breed pages are written.

prompts.bernedoodle: a Bernedoodle (Bernese Mountain Dog and Poodle cross) with a wavy-to-curly medium-length coat in classic tri-color markings: a black body, a white chest blaze, and rust/copper points above the eyes and on the cheeks; a fluffy teddy-bear face and floppy ears
prompts.goldendoodle: a Goldendoodle (Golden Retriever and Poodle cross) with a soft wavy-curly coat in warm apricot-gold, a rounded teddy-bear face, dark eyes and a dark nose, and floppy ears
prompts.mini-golden-retriever: a Mini Golden Retriever: a small dog closely resembling a compact Golden Retriever, with a wavy medium-length golden coat, feathered floppy ears, and a gentle warm expression
prompts.saint-berdoodle: a Saint Berdoodle (Saint Bernard and Poodle cross): a large dog with a wavy shaggy coat in mahogany-brown-and-white markings, a broad head, dark soulful eyes, and floppy ears
prompts.mini-aussie: a Miniature Australian Shepherd (Mini Aussie) with a medium-length blue-merle coat (mottled grey-and-black patches) with copper/tan points and white markings on the face and chest, semi-erect ears, and heterochromia (one blue eye, one brown eye)
prompts.pomsky: a Pomsky (Pomeranian and Siberian Husky cross): a small fluffy dog with Husky-style grey-and-white facial markings and mask, a thick double coat, bright blue eyes, and small pricked pointed ears
prompts.australian-labradoodle: an Australian Labradoodle with a uniform soft fleece coat in caramel-cream, a teddy-bear face, dark eyes and a dark nose, and floppy ears
prompts.teacup-poodle: a Teacup Poodle: a very tiny toy poodle with a dense curly apricot coat, dark round eyes, a small refined muzzle, and soft fluffy rounded grooming
prompts.mini-dachshund: a Miniature Dachshund: a very small short-legged, long-bodied dog with a smooth shiny coat in rich red, long floppy ears, and an alert friendly face, its low long silhouette clearly visible
prompts.german-shepherd: a German Shepherd Dog with the classic black-and-tan saddle coat pattern, large erect pointed ears, a black muzzle, an athletic build, and a confident noble expression
prompts.golden-mountain-dog: a Golden Mountain Dog (a Golden Retriever crossed with a Bernese Mountain Dog): a large fluffy dog whose coat is PREDOMINANTLY warm GOLDEN and light-brown like a Golden Retriever, with only SOFT, muted Bernese-style accents — a white chest blaze and faint rust markings; NOT a black-coated Bernese. The overall impression is a big golden, cream-and-brown fluffy dog, broad friendly face, dark eyes, floppy ears
prompts.toy-aussie: a Toy Australian Shepherd: a very small Aussie with a blue-merle coat (mottled grey-and-black) with copper points and white markings, a medium fluffy coat, and pale blue eyes
prompts.french-bulldog: a French Bulldog: a small muscular compact dog with a smooth fawn coat, large erect bat ears, a flat wrinkled face, a short muzzle, and dark wide-set eyes
prompts.cockapoo: a Cockapoo (Cocker Spaniel and Poodle cross): a small dog with a soft wavy coat in buff-apricot, long floppy ears, round dark eyes, and a cheerful teddy-bear face
prompts.labradoodle: a Labradoodle (Labrador Retriever and Poodle cross): a medium-large dog with a wavy shaggy coat in cream-yellow, floppy ears, a dark nose, and a friendly expression
prompts.maltipoo: a Maltipoo (Maltese and Poodle cross): a small fluffy dog with a soft white-to-cream coat, large round dark eyes, a black nose, and a sweet teddy-bear face
prompts.cavapoo: a Cavapoo (Cavalier King Charles Spaniel and Poodle cross): a small dog with a soft wavy coat in Blenheim chestnut-and-white markings, long feathered floppy ears, and large soft dark eyes
prompts.cane-corso: a Cane Corso: a large powerful Italian mastiff with a short sleek black coat, a broad muscular head, natural uncropped folded ears, a strong jaw, and an alert confident expression
prompts.dalmatian: a Dalmatian: an athletic short-coated pure-white dog densely covered in distinct, well-defined black spots (including spots on the face and ears), with dark eyes and an alert friendly expression
